TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Kevin Brooks nalecuhan i Beaufort, South Carolina, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Kevin Brooks i 1991 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 18, namapili' tu nu Milwaukee Bucks putiput. 10 bulad 12 demiad, 1969 a mihca, Kevin Brooks, miunduay. u canan ku NBA kanatal kanas-mali putiput, Amilika: National Basketball Association, sapuyu'en NBA, u Amis-Amilika tatama syubay kanas-mali putiput. izaw 30 a mali cebang, mikitinay tusa a subal, sawaliyan atu satipan. cacay subal izaw tulu a cu, cacay a cu izaw lima a cebang, cacay cebang namakay Canada, u zama sa namakay Amilika. kya madademec "Amilika syubay kanas-mali nisakaput sasasedsed, acasa "Amilika kanas nisakaput sasasedsed", sapuyu'en "Amilika syubay kanas", acasa kakelul han NBA.
S.PHON: k…ô*in brooks nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i b…ôaufort, soutńß ¶aror~…ĺina, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…ĺi miunduaj nu amir~…ĺika nba nisakaput, pańßanńßanan tu kawaw ajza. k…ô*in brooks i **** a mińß ¶an nba sapapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° mimar~…ĺiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…ĺsir~…ĺ **, namapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu nu mir~…ĺwauk…ô…ô bu ¶ks putiput. ** bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad, **** a mińß ¶a, k…ô*in brooks, miunduaj. u ¶anan ku nba kanatar~…ĺ kanas-mar~…ĺi putiput, amir~…ĺika: nationar~…ĺ bask…ôtbar~…ĺr~…ĺ asso ¶iation, sapuju Ē~ °…ôn nba, u amis-amir~…ĺika tatama sjubaj kanas-mar~…ĺi putiput. izaw ** a mar~…ĺi ¶…ôbaŇč, mikitinaj tusa a subar~…ĺ, sawar~…ĺijan atu satipan. ¶a ¶aj subar~…ĺ izaw tur~…ĺu a ¶u, ¶a ¶aj a ¶u izaw r~…ĺima a ¶…ôbaŇč, ¶a ¶aj ¶…ôbaŇč namakaj ¶anada, u zama sa namakaj amir~…ĺika. kja madad…ôm…ô ¶ "amir~…ĺika sjubaj kanas-mar~…ĺi nisakaput sasas…ôds…ôd, a ¶asa "amir~…ĺika kanas nisakaput sasas…ôds…ôd", sapuju Ē~ °…ôn "amir~…ĺika sjubaj kanas", a ¶asa kak…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺ ńßan nba.
S.FORM: Kevin Brooks nalecuhan i Beaufort, South Carolina, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Kevin Brooks i 1991 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 18, namapili' tu nu Milwaukee Bucks putiput. 10 bulad 12 demiad, 1969 a mihca, Kevin Brooks, miunduay. u canan ku NBA kanatal kanas-mali putiput, Amilika: National Basketball Association, sapuyu'en NBA, u Amis-Amilika tatama syubay kanas-mali putiput. izaw 30 a mali cebang, mikitinay tusa a subal, sawaliyan atu satipan. cacay subal izaw tulu a cu, cacay a cu izaw lima a cebang, cacay cebang namakay Canada, u zama sa namakay Amilika. kya madademec "Amilika syubay kanas-mali nisakaput sasasedsed, acasa "Amilika kanas nisakaput sasasedsed", sapuyu'en "Amilika syubay kanas", acasa kakelul han NBA.
S.PHON: k…ô*in brooks nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i b…ôaufort, soutńß ¶aror~…ĺina, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…ĺi miunduaj nu amir~…ĺika nba nisakaput, pańßanńßanan tu kawaw ajza. k…ô*in brooks i **** a mińß ¶an nba sapapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° mimar~…ĺiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…ĺsir~…ĺ **, namapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu nu mir~…ĺwauk…ô…ô bu ¶ks putiput. ** bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad, **** a mińß ¶a, k…ô*in brooks, miunduaj. u ¶anan ku nba kanatar~…ĺ kanas-mar~…ĺi putiput, amir~…ĺika: nationar~…ĺ bask…ôtbar~…ĺr~…ĺ asso ¶iation, sapuju Ē~ °…ôn nba, u amis-amir~…ĺika tatama sjubaj kanas-mar~…ĺi putiput. izaw ** a mar~…ĺi ¶…ôbaŇč, mikitinaj tusa a subar~…ĺ, sawar~…ĺijan atu satipan. ¶a ¶aj subar~…ĺ izaw tur~…ĺu a ¶u, ¶a ¶aj a ¶u izaw r~…ĺima a ¶…ôbaŇč, ¶a ¶aj ¶…ôbaŇč namakaj ¶anada, u zama sa namakaj amir~…ĺika. kja madad…ôm…ô ¶ "amir~…ĺika sjubaj kanas-mar~…ĺi nisakaput sasas…ôds…ôd, a ¶asa "amir~…ĺika kanas nisakaput sasas…ôds…ôd", sapuju Ē~ °…ôn "amir~…ĺika sjubaj kanas", a ¶asa kak…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺ ńßan nba.
